complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: 프로젝트 초기 설정 및 환경 구성
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the project initialization into: 1) Vite project creation and basic setup, 2) Package dependencies installation and configuration, 3) ESLint and Prettier setup, 4) Folder structure creation and TypeScript configuration
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard project setup with well-documented tools. Low complexity due to following established patterns, but multiple configuration steps require systematic approach.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Tailwind CSS 설정 및 기본 레이아웃 구성
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Tailwind CSS installation and configuration, 2) Dark mode setup with class-based toggling, 3) Basic layout structure (header, navigation, content), 4) Color system definition, 5) Responsive design implementation and testing
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity involving CSS framework configuration, responsive design considerations, and dark mode implementation. Requires understanding of design systems and layout patterns.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: 상태 관리 및 라우팅 시스템 구현
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Zustand store architecture design, 2) State management implementation (active tool, dark mode, favorites), 3) LocalStorage persistence layer, 4) Tab navigation component creation, 5) Performance optimization for sub-50ms transitions, 6) State persistence testing and validation
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate to high complexity involving state management patterns, performance requirements (50ms), and persistence. Critical foundation component affecting entire application.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Component structure and UI layout, 2) JSON parsing and validation logic, 3) Formatting and compression toggle functionality, 4) Error handling and user feedback, 5) Copy and reset functionality implementation
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity with JSON parsing, error handling, and user interaction features. Requires robust validation and performance considerations for large files.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) JWT token parsing and structure validation, 2) Base64 decoding implementation, 3) JSON formatting and display, 4) Error handling for invalid tokens
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Relatively straightforward implementation using standard Base64 decoding. Lower complexity due to well-defined JWT structure and standard browser APIs.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Base64 Encoder/Decoder 및 URL Encoder/Decoder 구현
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Base64Converter component with bidirectional conversion, 2) URLConverter component implementation, 3) UTF-8 support and special character handling, 4) Real-time vs button-based conversion options
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low to moderate complexity using standard browser APIs. Straightforward encoding/decoding operations with well-established patterns.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Regex input validation and error handling, 2) Real-time matching logic implementation, 3) Text highlighting and match visualization, 4) Capture group display functionality, 5) Flag options (g, i, m) implementation, 6) Performance optimization for large text processing
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Higher complexity due to regex processing, real-time highlighting, performance considerations with large text, and complex user interaction patterns.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Text Diff Tool 및 Hash Generator 구현
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) react-diff-viewer integration and configuration, 2) Text comparison logic and side-by-side view, 3) Hash generator implementation with crypto-js, 4) Multiple hash algorithm support (MD5, SHA256, SHA512), 5) Performance testing and optimization for large files
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity involving third-party library integration, cryptographic functions, and performance considerations for large file processing.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: PWA 설정 및 오프라인 지원 구현
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) vite-plugin-pwa installation and configuration, 2) Web App Manifest creation, 3) Service Worker caching strategy implementation, 4) Offline functionality testing, 5) PWA installation capabilities, 6) Lighthouse PWA optimization to 90+ score
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Higher complexity involving PWA concepts, service workers, caching strategies, and meeting specific performance metrics. Requires understanding of offline-first architecture.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Comprehensive integration testing across all 7 tools, 2) Performance optimization and code splitting, 3) Bundle size optimization, 4) TypeScript strict mode validation, 5) Vercel deployment configuration, 6) Cross-browser compatibility testing, 7) Lighthouse optimization to 90+ scores across all metrics
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity involving comprehensive testing, performance optimization, deployment configuration, and meeting multiple quality metrics. Integration challenges across all components.
